message:
fix: resolve settings modal UX issues for stable professional interface

Fixes the three critical UX problems:

1. Fixed Toggle Jumping:
- Remove space before cursor in sprintf format string
- Cursor position now consistent: "%s%s%-40s" not "%s %s%-40s"
- Toggles no longer shift left when selected

2. Added Button Navigation:
- Include Save/Cancel as navigable fields in Actions section
- Arrow keys can reach all fields including buttons
- Enter key activates buttons to save/cancel

3. Always Show Descriptions:
- Remove focused-only condition for field descriptions
- All help text always visible for better UX
- No more vanishing descriptions when navigating

Expected Layout (Fixed):
    Container Runtime                     docker
    Choose which container CLI to use

    > SSH keys                            ON
      Mount ~/.ssh (read-only) for SSH authentication

    GitHub CLI credentials                OFF
    Mount gh config for GitHub operations

Actions
    Save Configuration
    Save changes to config file

    Cancel
    Exit without saving changes

Benefits:
- ✅ No content jumping - cursor stays in consistent position
- ✅ Always-visible help - descriptions never vanish
- ✅ Full navigation - arrows reach all fields including buttons
- ✅ Professional appearance - stable layout and clean styling

🤖 Generated with Claude Code
